zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulcher de Eatington於大約1096年出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾廷頓時，他的父親Sewell de Eatington39歲，母親Mrs Sewell Eatington37歲。他於1128年之前與Mrs Fulcher de Eatington結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1141年在英國德比夏爾莎莉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulcher de Eatington于大约1096年出生在英国瓦維其可爾艾廷頓时，他的父亲Sewell de Eatington39岁，母亲Mrs Sewell Eatington37岁。他于1128年之前与Mrs Fulcher de Eatington结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1141年在英国德比夏爾莎莉享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eatington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Edington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Edington in Northumberland, Somerset, and Wiltshire, or from Eddington, Berkshire. Edington in Northumberland arises from Old English Idingtūn, from the Old English personal name Ida, + ing, denoting association, + tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Ida ). In Somerset, the name comes either from the Old English male name Ēadwine or from the feminine Ēadwynn + ing + tūn. Edington (Wiltshire) is from either the Old English personal name Ētha + dūn ‘hill’, or from Old English ēthe ‘uncultivated’ + dūn.

nameMeanings.name: Fulcher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly East Anglia): from the Middle English personal name Fulcher, Fulchier, Fulger, Fulker, Foucher, a name of Norman introduction, from an Old French form of ancient Germanic Fulchar, Fulcher. Old English Folchere (not recorded after 824) and Old Danish Folkar (otherwise unrecorded in England) are alternative, but unlikely sources of the surname.

variants.name: Fudge
meanings: Generally, no doubt, a transferred use of the surname, rather than a coinage with direct reference to the legal officer (Old French juge, from Latin iudex). As a Jewish name it represents a translation of the Hebrew name Dayan, which denotes a rabbinic judge.

variants.name: Folger
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from hólmr ‘island’ + geirr ‘spear’. It was borne by one of Charlemagne's generals, known in English as ‘Ogier the Dane’.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulcher de Eatington was born about 1096, in Ettington, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sewell de Eatington, was 39 and his mother, Mrs Sewell Eatington, was 37. He married Mrs Fulcher de Eatington before 1128. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1141, in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulcher d’Eatington est né environ 1096, à Ettington, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sewell d’Eatington, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs Sewell Eatington, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Fulcher d’Eatington avant 1128. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1141, à Shirley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulcher de Eatington um 1096 in Ettington, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sewell de Eatington 39 und seine Mutter Mrs Sewell Eatington 37. Er hat vor 1128 Mrs Fulcher de Eatington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1141 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Shirley, Derbyshire, England.

Lui sposato Mrs Fulcher de Eatington prima del 1128. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1141, nel Shirley, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Fulcher de Eatington(이)가 대략 1096년 영국 워윅실르 틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sewell de Eatington(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Sewell Eatington(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1128년 이전 Mrs Fulcher de Eatington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1141년 영국 더비실르 실를리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulcher de Eatington родился около 1096 г. в местности эттингтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sewell de Eatington было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Sewell Eatington, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Fulcher de Eatington перед 1128 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1141 г. в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
